summary: Cloud backend sync decomposition completed without public API changes.
findings: cloud-backend.ts now remains the CloudBackend facade at 390 lines; sync orchestration moved to cloud-backend-sync.ts, inspect/config reporting moved to cloud-backend-inspect.ts, and HTTP request/header transport moved to cloud-backend-request.ts. Hotspot warning count decreased from 38 to 37.
residual_risks: Cloud behavior is covered by focused backend sync/load tests but full hosted CI remains required before merge because backend sync is shared infrastructure.
